Compliance.description: ICASA licensed, recent DFA approval; past consumer fine but no major 2025/26 issues.

Product Value.description: Competitive data-heavy plans, SIM-only flexibility; recent ~5% hikes.

Innovation.description: Google Cloud AI partnership, SA first 5G VoNR, VodaPay super app, 5G expansion.

Customer Support.description: TOBi chat/phone/stores available but frequent complaints on resolution times/expertise.

pricing.name: Pricing

socialSentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly negative on HelloPeter (billing/service); apps praised for convenience but buggy.

Compliance.description: ICASA licensed and compliant per 2024/25 report; no fines or violations in 2025/26. Past issues resolved.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.37/5 (6,726 reviews), NPS -54; dominant complaints on service quality despite 100% response rate.

Compliance.description: ICASA approved Blue Label ownership transfer Jan 2025; fined R500k by National Consumer Tribunal for CPA violation on roaming overcharges; data breach reported but no POPIA fine noted.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Low ratings across platforms: Trustpilot 1.7/5, PissedConsumer 1.7/5, app stores mixed; complaints dominate on service failures despite some coverage improvements.

Product Value.description: Competitive low pricing beats MTN/Vodacom on cost (e.g. cheaper data bundles); good value for budget users but coverage/speed reliant on partners.

Innovation.description: Asset-light roaming on MTN/Vodacom for LTE coverage; 5G launch imminent 2025; MVNO hosting growth (FNB, Capitec); refreshed app with OTP login, balances; rebranded 2024.

Customer Support.description: Frequent complaints on unresponsive support, long waits, unhelpful agents, poor resolution (WhatsApp, phone, stores); some positive store experiences.

Accessibility & Security.description: Recent ransomware data breach exposed customer data; POPIA compliance unconfirmed but incident raises concerns on security practices; app access ok but low ratings suggest usability issues; no specific inclusivity info.

socialSentiment.summary: Predominantly negative on reviews sites; complaints on service/billing outweigh positives on price/coverage.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.14/5 (5k reviews, 94% 1-star), Trustpilot 1.4/5; widespread complaints on service/billing.

Product Value.description: Competitive plans w/bundles/deals, recent hikes (5.4% avg) but speed increases offset; good value on network perf.
